title: First Light
description: Low clouds breaking over the ridge as the first light cut through.
alt: Sunrise over a mountain ridge with soft cloud cover

title: Night Transfer
description: A brief pause between trains with sodium light bouncing across wet pavement.
alt: Person standing in a city scene at night

title: Quiet Geometry
description: Sharp shadows and hard lines under a high desert noon.
alt: Minimal scene with crisp lines and bright daylight

title: Through Glass
description: Layered reflections created a second city over the first.
alt: Urban portrait scene with layered reflections

title: Salt Wind
description: Cold air, soft rain, and a horizon line that never quite settled.

title: Signal Red
description: One saturated accent carrying the entire frame.
alt: High contrast image with a dominant red tone

title: Second Story
description: Late-afternoon light pulling texture from old painted walls.
alt: Historic building facade lit by warm evening light

title: Tidal Quiet
description: A long exposure that turned surf into a smooth metallic field.
alt: Minimal seascape with smooth water from long exposure
